name: TANGER INC.
business: Tanger Inc. is a fully-integrated, self-administered and self-managed REIT that focuses on developing, acquiring, owning, operating and managing outlet and other open-air retail centers. Its consolidated portfolio consists of 31 outlet centers and three open-air lifestyle centers with over 2,600 stores representing over 700 store brands.

exposures.sentence: Our centers compete for customers primarily with retail centers built and operated by different developers, traditional shopping malls, full- and off-price retailers and e-commerce retailers.
We face risks associated with climate change and severe weather.
